name: DenialGPT
description: Denial Prevention and Gap Analysis Agent for hospital revenue cycle teams.

skills.name: analyze_denial
skills.description: Classifies a claim denial, extracts CARC codes, identifies required evidence, calculates appeal deadline, and diagnoses root cause.

skills.name: fetch_clinical_evidence
skills.description: Queries the FHIR sandbox for patient clinical records relevant to the denial type using SHARP headers.

skills.name: gap_analysis
skills.description: Compares payer requirements against FHIR clinical evidence. Returns STRONG / WEAK / DO NOT APPEAL verdict with chain-of-thought reasoning.
